work contact about writing

work

  1. 2026 skadooble ↗ AI studying app — persistent per-unit question banks plus consolidated finals with cross-unit synthesis.
  2. 2025 flowviant ↗ A web app, live at app.flowviant.com.
  3. 2024 dekard ↗ A CLI that concatenates a project's files into one document for feeding as context to an LLM.

writing

  • Why My Site Is a Canvas Jun 30, 2026 The thinking behind navigating a portfolio through a node graph instead of a menu.

about

i'm wayleem.

i build web apps, and i like to unsuccessfully mess with markets. currently working full-time as a fullstack dev while building side projects.

working on flowviant and skadooble.
